0.title: 2026 Season Preview: A Clean Slate in the ACC
0.subtitle: Fifteen teams, zero losses, and one trophy — the dynasty league kicks off Week 0
0.author: Tdoghawks23

sections.heading: Season Outlook
sections.content: A new season is finally here. Every team in the conference sits at 0-0, and until the games kick off, everyone can dream about hoisting the ACC Championship trophy. Clemson opens the season at the top of the preseason Dynasty Poll and enters as the team to beat, but Miami and Louisville both have legitimate title aspirations. With a 15-week road to the conference championship, the margin for error is thin — early stumbles in September have a way of haunting teams come November.

sections.heading: Teams to Watch
sections.content: Clemson carries the preseason #1 tag and the pressure that comes with it. Miami boasts the most explosive offense on paper, while Louisville's balanced roster makes the Cardinals a trendy title pick. Don't sleep on the middle of the pack either — NC State, Duke, and Pittsburgh all cracked the preseason Top 25, and Georgia Tech and Virginia Tech are lurking just behind them. At the bottom, Wake Forest and Stanford are looking to prove the projections wrong.

sections.heading: Schedule on the Way
sections.content: The Week 0 slate hasn't been set just yet — the league is still working through the transfer portal, and the full schedule will be generated in-game once rosters are locked. Check the Schedule page once matchups are announced to see who opens the season against whom. In the meantime, the preseason Dynasty Poll is live and the standings are wiped clean — all fifteen teams start from zero.
